name: multiplayer-markdown
description: Self-hosted real-time collaborative sync for Obsidian vaults, with per-folder permissions.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @multiplayer-markdown/sync-core run verify && pnpm --filter @multiplayer-markdown/server run verify:sync && pnpm --filter @multiplayer-markdown/server run verify:persistence && pnpm --filter @multiplayer-markdown/server run verify:auth && pnpm --filter @multiplayer-markdown/server run verify:attachments && pnpm --filter @multiplayer-markdown/server run verify:admin && pnpm --filter @multiplayer-markdown/server run verify:rooms && pnpm --filter @multiplayer-markdown/server run verify:offline-merge
